name: Lab setup child B: spawn a mug
description: Inherits the lab base setup and spawns an extra mug before the predict step so the final world has two objects. Overrides actions and object_count expectation.

metadata.gallery_intent: inheritance child adding actions and overriding object expectation
metadata.first_triage_step: If this fails after the base scenario passes, inspect the spawn_object bbox and the followup predict step.
